function[T0: lib(lattice).MeetSemilattice] { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: lib(list).List[T0]) { x1 <= lib(list).list_inf[T0](x2, x3) = lib(list).list_lower_bound[T0](lib(list).List.cons[T0](x2, x3), x1) } }
function[T0: lib(monoid).Monoid, T1: lib(monoid).Monoid] { forall(x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0 -> T1) { not lib(monoid).is_monoid_hom[T0, T1](x1) or x1 != x2 or lib(monoid).is_monoid_hom[T0, T1](x2) } }
function[T0: lib(field).Field] { forall(x1: lib(int).Int, x2: lib(int).Int, x3: T0) { not x1 >= lib(int).Int.0 or not x2 >= lib(int).Int.0 or x3.zpow(x1 * x2) = x3.zpow(x1).zpow(x2) } }
